view.name: Energy and Water Use - Municipal Buildings
view.description: In the spirit of leading by example, the City released benchmarking information for municipal buildings. The data includes property name, location, property size (ft²), Energy STAR scores where available, energy intensity (kBTU/ft²), water use (kilo-gallons), total GHG emissions (Metric Tons CO₂e), and several more metrics.

columns.name: Zip Codes
columns.description: This column was automatically created in order to record in what polygon from the dataset 'Zip Codes' (qz3q-ghft) the point in column 'location_1' is located. This enables the creation of region maps (choropleths) in the visualization canvas and data lens.

columns.name: Census Tracts
columns.description: This column was automatically created in order to record in what polygon from the dataset 'Census Tracts' (k96s-3jcv) the point in column 'location_1' is located. This enables the creation of region maps (choropleths) in the visualization canvas and data lens.
